title: Journey Beyond Earth: The Wonders of Space Exploration

questions.sentence: Space exploration is our human effort to travel into space and discover new things about the universe
For centuries people have looked up at the stars and wondered what was out there
One of the most famous moments in space exploration was in 1969
We have sent robotic probes to explore distant planets like Mar's and Jupiter
It helps us understand the origin of our universe and Earth itself
Space research often leads to new technologies that benefit us directly on Earth
